name: Renewal Fuels, Inc.
summary: Renewal Fuels, Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets biodiesel processing equipment and accessories in the United States. The company offers FuelMeister line of biodiesel processors, which allow users to make biodiesel from waste vegetable oil for personal use. It is involved in growing cellulosic feedstock for the biofuels industry. The company sells and distributes its products through a network of dealers. Renewal Fuels, Inc. was founded in 2007 and is based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin.
